items.title: This behavior is by design

items.title: Emigre typography and graphic design magazine (1984–2005)
items.summary: Emigre magazine was a highly influential graphic design publication. The magazine was published from 1984 (year of the Macintosh launch) until 2005, and during its run it played a critical role i…
